title: Record soft64/async52 compaction and 16k/500 tool budgets

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft64 Async52 Tool16k Contract

## Soft 64
full compaction soft trigger defaults to 0.64 so long sessions reclaim earlier while hard block stays at 0.90

## Async 52
async background compaction and swarm micro pressure start at 0.52 so pre-rot reclaim begins sooner

## Tool 16k
tool-result budgets trim at 16k chars with 500-char previews for denser long-horizon context

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status vitest
